sections.paragraph:
verb לפרוק

to unload; free, vent, deliver; disarm; discharge

verb להיפרק

be unloaded; disarmed; discharged

verb לפרק

to dismantle, decompose; factorize; remove, disarm; undo, wind up, liquidate; discharge

verb פורק

be dismantled, decomposed; factorized; removed; unloaded; be undone, wound up, liquidated

verb להתפרק

be dismantled, decomposed; factorized (math.); be undone, wound up, liquidated; exhausted; to disarm oneself; throw off, free oneself, relax

verb לפרק (>>פירק)

to dismantle, decompose; factorize; remove, disarm

masculine noun

chapter, installment, instalment; section, segment

joint

masculine noun

period

frock, cutaway
